## You push   
boundaries.   
We remove the   
I/O limits.
Cri/oFlex® superconducting cables replace conventional wiring inside cryostats, delivering higher channel density, lower thermal load, and proven reliability at scale. Built in Delft for quantum systems that demand more.
[ Explore technology ](https://delft-circuits.com/technology/)
[ Why Delft Circuits? ](https://delft-circuits.com/company/)

In-house design, manufacturing, and testing. Every I/O chain verified before shipment.

50+ people. 20+ nationalities. Build the I/O infrastructure that powers quantum’s next leap.

## // TECHNOLOGY
## Advance your  
quantum system.  
Not your cabling complexity.
Every channel, every system, every test — engineered to remove the limits between you and your quantum ambition.
  * Superconducting NbTi flex — 10× lower thermal load
  * Integrated filtering — fewer components, fewer failure points
  * Eight channels per flex, 0.3 mm thin — density without compromise
